---
title:  "{{PROJECT_TITLE}}"
author: "Prof. Dr.-Ing. Peter Fröhlich"
date:   today
---

Document body — replace with content.

<!-- matctl:fingerprint-colophon -->
## Colophon {.unnumbered}

*Document fingerprint:* `{{< var commit >}}` ({{< var commit_date >}}) · *template* `{{< var template >}}`
<!-- /matctl:fingerprint-colophon -->
